reviews.originalComment: Hotel dengan fasilitas yang sangat baik, kamarnya juga sangat luas dengan fasilitas pool yang jarang ditemukan di Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: A hotel with very good facilities, the rooms are also very spacious with a pool facility that is rare in Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya keren, dekat kemana2, karyawan hotel nya sangat ramay sekali, pelayanan nya bgus👍
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is great, close to everything, the hotel staff is very friendly, and the service is good.👍

I cant get an official receipt to make a claim from my company. The hotel does not provide payment made direct to AGODA. And AGODA  is unable to send via email. The fuction seems to be down. Not sure why. This is not the first time. IF i cant get reimburse from my company, I will have to change to other service provider. 

Please help me  urgently




Michael SOh

Agado does not issue or unable to issue due to system down

The same for Grand Nanggroe Hotel

reviews.reviewTitle: The receptionist staff is not very communicative and polite.
reviews.originalTitle: Staf recepsionist kurang komunikatif dan sopan
reviews.originalComment: Hotelnyaa lumayan bagus, ada kolam renang dan gym meskipun alatnya tidak terlalu banyak namun utk harga segitu sdh oke. Yang sangat disayangkan adalah saat kartu kamar tertinggal di kamar, recepsionist meminta saya mengambil kembali kartu ke kamar agar bisa checkout namun setelah saya mencari cari kartu diatas ternyata kartu sdh diambil oleh stafnya. Seharusnya recepsionist bisa lebih ramah dan komunikatif, terlebih tidak ada permintaan maaf sama sekali karna sudah buat saya kebingungan dan bolak balik dari lt atas ke lt bawah
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is quite nice, there is a swimming pool and gym even though there are not many equipment, but for that price it is fine. What is very unfortunate is that when I left my room key in the room, the receptionist asked me to go back to the room to get the key so I could check out, but after I searched for the key, it had already been taken by the staff. The receptionist should be friendlier and more communicative, especially since there was no apology at all for making me confused and having to go back and forth from the upper floor to the lower floor.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel dengan fasilitas yang sangat baik, kamarnya juga sangat luas dengan fasilitas pool yang jarang ditemukan di Banda Aceh

reviews.originalComment: Kita gak rekom di, kamar berdebu, banyak nyamuk, Terus waktu mintak bill hotel salah gak bisa buat katanya...
reviews.reviewComments: We don't recommend this place; the room is dusty, there are many mosquitoes, and when we asked for the hotel bill, it was wrong and they said they couldn't fix it...
the hotel is old

reviews.reviewTitle: Breakfast totally failed.my family having a diarrehea
reviews.reviewComments: Disgusting

I chose this hotel as I wanted to use the swimming pool everyday during my stay there. I was not allowed to use the pool as the pool area was used for a wedding reception. I wish I was told earlier on so that I could cancel my booking. I tried to check out after my first day and I asked for reimbursement. The hotel management agreed to reimburse but at the promotional rate. When the staff later told me that they could only pay the following day as Sunday is a public holiday, I changed my mind about checking out. I will never stay at that hotel or recommend anyone staying there. 

The hotel is far from the city centre. The room is big and clean but it  is old. Water is leaking from the sink in the bathroom. It is  a very disappointing stay at the hotel.
breakfast was superb. and the staff. are friendly and polite.
Hotel was nice

reviews.reviewTitle: You get what you paid for! I suppose.
reviews.reviewComments:
Hotel  should try to encourage staff to learn basic English.Noise level also try to reduce at nIght time to let people sleep .
May be management invest in Food covers and keep hot piping  food.

Hotel not good.. room dirty..swimming pool dirty.. food not good at all.
Not reccomended

The hotel is more dated than it appears in photos. Very dim lights, so there were quite a lot of mosquitoes. Our shower was not working well, the water spray was more like a mist. During the time of our visit, not only was wi fi erratic, phone lines were not working too. Overpriced for what we experienced.
Ok
Wasn't close to city, staffs are friendly and helpful. Light in the room are dim
Except for the bedsheet that is so thin that you can seethe bed cover.The air con does not function at the right temp setting
Renovations!
ITS JUAT OKAY, THE ROOM IS NOT VERY BIG BUT JUST OKAY FOR THE STAY HERE

reviews.reviewTitle: I got good service from hotel staff

reviews.reviewComments: An average experience. Took a while for check-in process. Unfortunate to get a room with poor air-cond performance & no kettle. However, we got a replacement room. Good local food for breakfast.

reviews.reviewTitle: An Ok Hotel For Short Visit
reviews.reviewComments: Stay 2 night for business trip, it's an ok hotel for short stay

reviews.reviewTitle: That hotel no maintenance, bed so thirty
reviews.reviewComments: Very bad experience
Stayed there for 1 night. Didn't really explore as had meeting the whole day.
Staff not helpful, food not nice, no airport shuttle, wifi not stable, room dirty... Not a pleasant stay, will not stay here again.
reviews.reviewPositives: atm machine at the hotel, affordable jigsaw standby front of hotel

reviews.reviewComments: Our stay was fine. Rooms smelled of cigarettes, however, which was somewhat unpleasant.
reviews.reviewPositives: Hotel is modern, fairly clean and has a swimming pool

reviews.reviewComments: This is an old hotel, with old furniture mostly, tv-cable channel is ok, wifi in rooms is ok, food is very common (eatable), location in city center
reviews.reviewPositives: Good location, Connectable WiFi, Nice pool
value for money, basic room, basic facility

reviews.reviewComments: I stayed here for two times. Great hotel with cheap price. Clean and comfortable, good internet connection, good service by the staff. Will come again next time.
Our stay was fine. However, the hotel is a little grungy and the room smelled badly of cigarettes. The food is not great at this hotel either.
reviews.reviewPositives: Offered free transport to the airport, breakfast included, conveniently located

reviews.reviewComments: I am not happy stay this hotel, because of not good service by hotel staff, and will not recomend to my friends to stay this hotel
reviews.reviewPositives: No good thing I found during stay this hotel

reviews.reviewComments: The Aircon was not working properly and the room was not clean. Friendly staff.
reviews.reviewPositives: Friendly staff, fast check-in and check-out

reviews.reviewComments: I like this hotel. I will recomend to my friend if they will go to this city.
location is good, the room is clean and neat, and comfrotable. staffs are very friendly and helpfull. overall satisfied
this hotel is nice hotel , but no problem for me , after hard work a long day , i fave nice sleep at hotel hehehe

* shower problem
* air condition not in the good condition

I dont usually complain about any hotel.
in fact most of the time i think they are all pretty decent and comfortable..

Grand Nanggroe Hotel was great too.. from check in to the rooms, no complains.

until i observe 2 things.
1: my room 4015 has a faulty door... the door itself, seems to be too short for its frame... therefore exposing the locking mechanics for the door lock. 
To open the door, simply inserting any card towards the locking mechanics through the door frame.. the mechanics of the lock will be pushed in and the door be open.. no key card needed.

this is quite a serious security breach.

having a long trip, we're tired to change a room again, this cause us to actually bring out every valuable we have when we leave the room.


2nd point, the bed sheets and blanket are really dirty.. initially i thought it's just dull in color. that judgement proves to be a bad mistake when i was badly awaken by itch on my legs and feet, areas covered by the blanket. from 2 am to 4 am, i couldn't sleep. i didnt want to make a complain to the counter as well.. this will cause people to start roaming in, lots of waiting and most likely will disturb my friend's sleep.

as much as i made my complain the next morning, i hope they can do better.
Stayed one night at the hotel, got warm greetings from the staffs. The amenities were a little bit old such as towels, but clean.
reviews.reviewPositives: The hotel located close to the airport but not to far from the city center

reviews.reviewTitle: Services are good and above expectations
reviews.reviewComments:
They picked us from the airport and along the way the driver helped us with few information. Receptionist were also helpful and suggested us places to go such as salon and spa, what transport to take and all others.
Hotel is quite out of town so privacy is kept well.
the price also reasonable. i would reccomend this to friends.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good service but lacking key facilities.
reviews.reviewComments: The stay was enjoyable for us as the location of the hotel is close to the airport and city. The staff were polite, helpful and welcoming. The room is decent but could be better maintained. There was no freezer (a key requirement for good hotels, and tempered our enjoyment of the facility to some extent). The rates could have been more competitive given the rise of new hotels around the city and the non-peak time of travel.

reviews.reviewTitle: great hotel but a little bit outside of the town
reviews.reviewComments: we just stay here for the night, its quite good, but a bit far from the downtown, but the upside is closer to the airport, just 15 minutes away. they also give u free shuttle between pick up from the airport or from the hotel to the airport (choose one).
reviews.reviewPositives: clean, big room, near the airport

reviews.reviewComments:
the grand naggroe hotel is a good hotel. it is clean and the service is top. ifeel very welcomed there and the stay was comfotable.

however, just 1 area where things could be improved. the wifi in rooms are not so strong. the signal is weak. i had to sit atthe cafe or lobby for a better connection.

overall, its a good hotel
reviews.reviewPositives: clean rooms, many tv channels, good service

reviews.reviewTitle: not great for a new hotel
reviews.reviewComments: bfast also was nothing great.
My 3 day 2 night visit is cool and valuable,even they was allow us to late check out until 2pm when we waiting for our next flight to home.

reviews.reviewTitle: staff is less able to be asked for help
reviews.reviewComments: the service is too rigid
Mantap untuk menginap pribadi maupun dengan keluarga
Dnga harga yg di tawarkan sudah sangat sesuai dgn ap yg di dapat

reviews.originalComment: bau kamarnya. kurang bersih dan lembab.saya yg alergi. gatel tidur di tempat tidurnya
reviews.reviewComments: the bedroom is not clean and damp. I have allergies. it itches to sleep in the bed.

reviews.reviewTitle: One of the big hotel in acheh
reviews.reviewComments: Good for stay, bit far from the city. Need to have own arranged transport to move around from this hotel.
Sebenarnya hotelnya bagus, tp buat gk bgs ada receptionistnya krg baik pelayanannya. Ketus x ngmgnya 👊
Ok boleh lah

reviews.reviewTitle: 不要接受总台按排的服务生驾驶的车辆.
reviews.reviewComments:
我们要去中心二个地方.在问总台线路时.服务生说很远.二个地方又彼此之间不同方向,他们马上就说给我们按排酒店内的车辆.价格是50万印尼元+50万印尼元.
我们去后才知道二个地方就在中心区也不远.1小时多些时间后我们回酒店,驾驶员直接收费100万印尼元,我们准备另外支付小费10万元.但驾驶员说没有零钱找.就直接收了50万小费.这样我们总支付是150万印尼元.
车费被宰了.(我们夫妻二人在国内都有车辆的.知道实际距离往返总的公里数才9KM+9KM=18KM.

2小时后我们走出酒店,自己在路边叫了双人摩的,再去这二个地方.收费是1万印尼+1万印尼元.
(1美元对换当地货币8900印尼元.)
Mantap
Mantap
Mantap
Good
Toiletnya bau, saran sih di bersihkan atau di berikan oengharum ruangan
MESKI BUKAN DIPUSAT KOTA PELAYANANNYA SANGAT MEMUASKAN
Grand Naggroe Hotel kebersihannya buruk sekali, kamar mandi kotor, lift juga kotor ... di kamar sprei juga seperti habis pakai

reviews.reviewTitle: fasilitas tdk sebanding dg harga hotel bintang 3
reviews.reviewComments: kebersihan sangat kurang, menu breakfast tdk variatif
kebersihan kurang, menu sarapan tidak variatif, dan lobby hotel yang gelap
kamar seperti tidak dibersihkan, menu sarapan yang seadanya, lampu lobby hotel yang dimatikan saat larut tengah malam dan dinyalakan setelah diminta saat check in
Hotel yang nyaman, pelayanannya ramah dari staff, fasilitas juga ok, berlibur bersama anak2 sangat nyaman tidak jauh dari objek wisata.
Booking online

reviews.reviewTitle: aman tertib bersih sejuk indah ramah kenangan

reviews.reviewPositives: aman tertib bersih sejuk indah ramah kenangan

reviews.reviewComments: Perlu segera renovasi ruangan kamar, kain gorden, selimut dan handuk mandi udah kusam dan jorok, kamar mandi bau buang besar mungkin pipa pembuangan air dan buang besar disatukan sehingga bau menyegat

reviews.reviewTitle: Kesan Pertama saya menginap di Hotel Grand Nangroe
reviews.reviewComments: Bersantai bersama keluarga cukup terpenuhi dengan menginap di Hotel Nangroe Banda Aceh ini . Terima Kasih .
reviews.reviewPositives: Lokasi strategis - Layanan memadai - Harga terjangkau

Kamar yang nyaman dan Layanan staf yang ramah

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel yang cukup nyaman di Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Cukup nyaman
reviews.reviewPositives: Lokasi yang dekat, shuttle to airport,

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel yang baik untuk melakukan meeting dan bisnis
reviews.reviewComments: Grand Nanggroe salah satu hotel bintang 4 yang bagus di banda aceh.,.walaupun lokasinya tidak terlalu strategis namun masih bisa dibilang dekat dengan segala atraksi yang ada dibanda aceh.,.kondisi hotel yang nyaman bisa jadi pertimbangan bagi anda yang ingin menginap disini

reviews.reviewTitle: HOtel mewah dengan pelayanan yang biasa saja
reviews.reviewComments: suatu pengalaman yang tak terlupakan menginap di hotel bintang 4 namun sangat terganggu dengan suara yang tidak jelas asal muasalnya.,.hal ini juga mungkin karena saya berada di lantai 4 dan sedang ada pembangunan hotel.,.overall this hotel is good
baik walau bukan saya pengunjung tersebut, karena pemesanan ditujukan untuk rekan yang sedang melakukan perjalanan dinas di aceh. keep up the good works agoda dan hotel2nya.

reviews.reviewTitle: hotel sedang renovasi , kamar kurang dingin
reviews.reviewComments:
kamar kurang dingin
kondisi sedang renovasi
pelayanan baik - standard
reviews.reviewPositives: pelayanan baik , staf friendly , harga murah

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel yang terletak di ring road Aceh. Cukup bersih dan memiliki fasilitas lengkap dengan harga yang tidak terlalu mahal. Fasilitas kolam renang, taxi, dan office support didapatkan dengan mudah
hotel sangat lumayan bersih cocok untuk menginap bagi yang mencari hotel di daerah banda aceh ada kolam renang dan bersih
hotel yang sebenarnya bagus namun terkesan biasa saja.. pinggir jalan besar yang berdebu.. pemandangan sekitar hotel tidak ada yg menarik..
hotel sangat lumayan bersih cocok untuk menginap bagi yang mencari hotel di daerah banda aceh ada kolam renang dan bersih

reviews.reviewTitle: hotel yang nyaris sempurna di "serambi mekah"
reviews.reviewComments: meskipun cek out jam 12.00, namun dapat ditolerir sampai jam 13.00. ok banget dech.
reviews.reviewPositives: fasilitas kmar sebenarnya sudah dapat dikatan baik, namun tidak tersedia apabila tidak diminta, seperti pemasan air dan handuk yang hanya ada 1 unit, tetap diadakan kembali karena kita meminta untuk dilengkapi.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel dengan kamar dan pelayanan kurang baik
reviews.reviewComments:
Kami menginap 2 malam Baru datang disambut oleh pembawa kopor yang lebih mirip satpam dan kurang ramah/wajah kaku. Di front desk hanya ada 1 staf wanita yang cukup ramah. Lorong menuju kamar agak gelap. Masuk kmr ac tidak dingin, stlh dibetulkan agak dingin. Sewaktu sy komplen mengenai AC, petugas bilang bahwa udara diluar memang sedang panas, padahal saya baru pindah dari hotel di seberangnya yang jauh lebih dingin. Saya memilih hotel ini karena ada kolam renang. Di kamar tidak ada kulkas, remot tv, pemanas air, kursi kerja dan meja tamu juga tidak ada. Pemanas air dan kursi kerja diberi setelah ada permintaan. Pesan makan siang capcay kuah dan ca’ brokoli+tahu tidak enak sepeti kurang bumbu. Kamar mandi saluran pembuangan air macet, air tergenang. Handuk2 benangnya sudah mbrodol, tidak tersedia sabun mandi cair. Makan malam pesan tenderloin steak hampir satu jam baru siap. Petugas sarapan di restoran kurang berfungsi.
Kelebihan: kmr cukup luas, ada internet dgn pasword.
reviews.reviewPositives: Hotel dipilih karena dekat dengan lokasi acara keluarga, dan ada kolam renang.

reviews.reviewComments:
Keadaan kamar hotel dan kamar mandi cukup bersih. Pelayanan ramah, membuat saya nyaman selama berada di sana.
Semoga dijaga terus mutunya, dan kalau bisa ditingkatkan.
reviews.reviewPositives: kamar nyaman, pelayanan memuaskan sesuai harga

reviews.reviewComments:
Hotel yang cukup baik untuk di daerah tersebut, namun sayangnya ternyata tepat di seberang jalan terdapat fasilitas pembangkit listrik tenaga diesel PLN yang menyala 24 jam dengan suara yang cukup mengganggu (khusus kamar yang menghadap ke jalan raya).
Fasilitas kamar cukup baik, standar saja hanya tekanan air pada shower dirasa sangat kurang, walau air panas tersedia.

WIFI var ustabilt og i blant helt borte.
Stundom var overflatevannet i bassenget dårlig reingjort.
Styrten ved bassenget mer eller mindre ute av funksjon, noe som sannsynligvis påvirker hvor reint bassengvannet er. 
Manglet solsenger ved bassenget.
Trimrommet rotete og svakt utstyrt.
